name: Oatmeal Bacon Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients, then add the egg and enough milk or buttermilk to make a batter like thick cream.
2. Fry the bacon rashers and drain, then cook a large pancake by pouring the batter over the entire bottom of the pan.
3. Cook on one side, then flip and spread with a little mustard if desired. Add the cooked bacon and fold over.
4. Make the remaining batter into additional pancakes using the same method. This yields 4 very large pancakes or 8 small ones.
